hooks.commandWindows: python -c "import os, runpy; home = os.environ.get('CODEX_HOME') or os.path.join(os.environ['USERPROFILE'], '.codex'); runpy.run_path(os.path.join(home, 'hooks', 'portable_guard.py'), run_name='__main__')"
